goal: Restore StoryScreen to a stable red-gold themed interface by fixing UI-layer styling issues only, without changing story text, chapter content, or gameplay/story logic.
constraints: Do not modify story copy, dialogue content, chapter data, or visible narrative text.
Do not change StoryScreen behavior beyond what is required to fix the abnormal interface presentation.
Limit edits to the StoryScreen presentation layer and directly related task records.
Do not modify community, battle, or unrelated menu screens.
deliverables: StoryScreen displays a stable red-gold interface instead of the previous abnormal blue presentation.
Story text and chapter content remain unchanged.
Project builds successfully after the UI fix.
